top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id)
FROM bond
WHERE bond_type = 'double'
  AND bond_id IN (
    SELECT bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id)
FROM bond
WHERE bond_type = 'double'
  AND bond_id IN (
    SELECT bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a ON (c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id)
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O'
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id)
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'O';
